reviews.comment:
Absolutely the worst visit I’ve had at any café. The food was bad, the beverages were even worse, and the so-called “bobastic coffechino” I ordered was downright terrible — easily the worst drink I’ve ever had.
To make things worse, they didn’t even bother clearing the table before we sat down. The service was horrendous from start to finish, and the staff took ages to take our order. By the time they finally did, I already regretted choosing this place. Sweet crunch nut mix is only filled with coconut absolutely disgusting
Save your time, save your money — Coffee Island is a complete disappointment. Not recommended at all.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.

reviews.comment:
Coffee Island has an espresso bar located in Amanora Mall, Hadapsar, Pune.
The Cafe has varieties of hot & cold coffee, shakes and mocktails.
The cappuccino was smooth and creamy. Pastries were fresh and tasty.
My experience at Coffee Island was truly delightful and memorable. The café offers a perfect combination of beautiful ambiance, delicious food, and warm hospitality !!!

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted to know you enjoyed your visit! It’s wonderful to hear that the coffee, food, ambience, and overall experience left a memorable impression.
